footer.tagline: Find your next home with BigCity
footer.taglineDesc: Browse featured listings, save favorites, and book a viewing in minutes.
footer.description: A modern real-estate marketplace for finding the right home — faster, simpler, and with beautiful listings.
footer.newsletterDesc: Get new listings and price drops sent to your inbox.

home.description: Discover premium properties designed for comfort, luxury, and a lifestyle you deserve.

about.title: About
about.description: We help people find places they love — from modern family homes to city apartments and investment properties — with a smooth, transparent experience from search to closing.
about.missionText: BigCity exists to make real estate feel simple. We combine curated listings, human support, and straightforward guidance so you can make confident decisions — whether you're buying, renting, or investing.
about.imageCaption1: Trusted guidance, modern listings, and a better way to move.
about.imageCaption2: Built for buyers, renters, and investors.
about.valuesDesc: Real estate can be noisy. We focus on what matters: clarity, speed, quality, and trust.
about.teamDesc: A small, focused team obsessed with making the home search feel premium — and painless.
about.ctaTitle: Ready to find your next place?
about.ctaDesc: Browse listings or reach out and we'll help you narrow it down.

values.title: Transparency
values.description: Clear pricing, clear information, and no surprises — we keep it simple and honest.

values.title: Quality listings
values.description: Curated properties with great photos and details so you can make faster decisions.

values.title: Support that moves
values.description: Quick answers and helpful guidance from discovery all the way to closing day.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.replyTime: We usually reply within 1 business day.
contact.helpPlaceholder: I'm looking for a 2-bedroom apartment in Santo Domingo...
contact.legalText: By sending this message, you agree to be contacted by BigCity.
contact.mapHelperText: Swap this box for Google Maps / Mapbox whenever you're ready.

faqs.question: Do you help with rentals and buying?
faqs.answer: Yes — rentals, purchases, and investment properties.

faqs.question: How soon can I view a property?
faqs.answer: Often same week, depending on availability.

faqs.question: Do you charge a fee?
faqs.answer: It depends on the service and location — we'll clarify upfront.
